title: selliguea finlaysoniana
intro: Selliguea finlaysoniana, also known as Polypodium lineare or Polypodium pellucidum, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia, particularly in the tropical regions of India, China, and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selliguea finlaysoniana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are commonly used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
